begining_of_contract.text: วันที่เริ่มสัญญา

root.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract.member_group_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no)as member_name , (CASE sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money WHEN 'TRB' THEN sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_code END)as bank_code , (CASE sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money WHEN 'TRB' THEN pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no ,'XXX-X-XXXXX-X') END)as bank_acc_no , (select coalesce(sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = '07' and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as amount , (select coalesce(sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.prakan_atm),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = '07' and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as prakan_atm , fpa_get_crem_memno(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no)as crem_memno from sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no and (select coalesce(sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = '07' and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) > 0 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'ฌ000443/65' order by sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no
